javax.media.mscontrol
Interface SupportedFeatures

public interface SupportedFeatures

Allow to query for the capabilities supported by the implementation.
Provides various Sets of enumerated items that are actually supported. Items not included are not supported.
All the Sets are read-only.

Method Summary
 java.util.Set<Action> getSupportedActions()
          Provide the Set of supported Actions.
 java.util.Set<EventType> getSupportedEventTypes()
          Provide the Set of supported EventTypes.
 java.util.Set<Parameter> getSupportedParameters()
          Provide the Set of supported Parameters.
 java.util.Set<Qualifier> getSupportedQualifiers()
          Provide the Set of supported Qualifiers.
 java.util.Set<Trigger> getSupportedTriggers()
          Provide the Set of supported Triggers.
 java.util.Set<Value> getSupportedValues()
          Provide the Set of supported Values.
